pages.text: The $(item)Magic Center Block$() is the $(bold)invisible$() anchor of your ritual setup. It defines the radius in which magic circles operate and provides the fuel they need to function.

To place one, $(bold)Shift + Right-click$() with the Ritual Dagger and choose a radius. The center is placed beneath your feet.$(br2)The center block is invisible but shows red particle effects along its radius. It breaks very easily and does not drop anything.

$(bold)Right-click$() the center block (or its location) to open the control GUI. From here you can:$(br2)$(li)Add Spirit Stones as fuel$(li)Toggle circle types on/off$(li)Configure entity filters$(li)Manage the player blacklist
